# Vanchi Vikash P M

> Software engineer building secure, production-grade web applications.
> Currently a Project Associate at C-DAC Chennai shipping fullstack systems for the Government of India.
> Actively transitioning toward ML/AI engineering.

## Identity

## Current role
- Title: Project Associate
- Org: Centre for Development of Advanced Computing (C-DAC), Chennai
- Start: July 2024
- Scope: Built and deployed two government portals (mail client, drafting system) for 500+ users using React/Next.js. Led end-to-end production deployment of the Supply Order Monitoring Portal (SOMP) for the Government of India — achieved "Safe to Host" certification from CERT-In, 99.9% uptime, and security clearance from CIRA. Closed 15+ critical VAPT findings (XSS, CSRF, clickjacking) by implementing HSTS, CSP, SSL/TLS hardening, dropping risk score by 85%.

## Education
- Degree: B.Tech, Computer Science and Engineering
- School: Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham
- Years: 2020 – 2024

## Skills
- Languages: TypeScript, JavaScript (ES6+), Python, SQL
- Frontend: React.js, Next.js, Redux Toolkit, Tailwind CSS, HTML5, CSS3
- Backend: Node.js, Socket.IO, REST APIs, Odoo 14, Firebase
- Security & DevOps: Linux, Apache, SSL/TLS, Burp Suite, VAPT, CI/CD
- Tools: Git, Postman, Webpack, VS Code, Chrome DevTools, Jest

## Projects
- Chatflow (Nov 2025): Dual-mode red-team orchestration platform combining a real-time web terminal and visual flow builder for automated VAPT. WebSocket backend orchestrates Nmap, Nuclei, and Gobuster scans; streams stdout into structured findings. Stack: TypeScript, React, Node.js, Socket.IO, Docker. Live: https://chat-flow-app.vercel.app
- Text Explainer / gExplain (Oct–Nov 2025): AI-powered Chrome extension with universal site compatibility (Gmail, GitHub, iframes), 4.8/5 user rating, 1000+ daily explanations at 200ms average response. Integrates Google Gemini API with rate limiting and SPA navigation detection. Stack: JS (ES6+), HTML5/CSS3, REST. Live: https://gexplain.vercel.app
- Video Streaming App / MyStream (Apr–May 2024): YouTube Data API client with debounced/cached search autocomplete and a polling-based live chat. Stack: React, Redux Toolkit, Tailwind, React Router. Live: https://mystream-sigma.vercel.app

## Currently learning
- Mathematics for ML: linear algebra, probability, optimization
- Deep Learning (Goodfellow et al.)
- Neural Networks: Zero to Hero (Karpathy)
- Hugging Face Transformers
- PyTorch fundamentals
- Building toward: agent systems, applied LLM eng, retrieval
